edge_explanation: Signal detects sentiment decay (social hype dying) 1-7 days before price crashes. Works because retail traders FOMO at peaks (high Fear & Greed) while whales exit (declining social interest). Emerging market traders are particularly vulnerable to these patterns.
moat: Uses CMC's unique multi-layer data (Fear & Greed Index + KOL sentiment + on-chain whale transfers). No competitor offers this specific divergence detection.
